description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian with a modern urban appearance, featuring a short-sleeved shirt with a large graphic and text on the back, paired with knee-length cargo shorts and casual sneakers. The individual wears a prominent bandana or face covering that covers the lower half of the face, adding to the streetwear aesthetic. His hair is styled in a spiky, voluminous fashion, giving a distinctive and youthful look. The figure's arms are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is athletic and proportionate. Visible details include a logo or emblem on the shirt's chest and a pocket on the shorts. The clothing and accessories suggest a casual, contemporary style suitable for city environments.
description: A modern adult male pedestrian in casual streetwear, featuring a graphic shirt, cargo shorts, sneakers, a face bandana, and spiky hair. The figure has an athletic build and a relaxed, upright stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face bandana, shirt logo, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiky hairstyle, bandana profile, and pocket on the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large graphic and text on the shirt's back and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the hairstyle, bandana, and the fit of the shirt and shorts.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt with graphic, knee-length cargo shorts, and a face bandana
